title: InfoGenius Skills Training Centre
details:
# Level 1: Basic Automation Concepts

Introduction to industrial automation systems, covering the role of PLCs, sensors, and actuators in modern manufacturing. Focused on understanding how automated systems communicate and respond to real-time inputs.

# Level 2: Industrial Automation Engineering Support Services
## Industrial Automation Engineering Support Services
- Industrial Automation Engineering Drafting
- Industrial Automation Computer Aided Design And Drafting
- Industrial Automation Fabrication And Sub-Assembling
- Industrial Automation Installation
- Industrial Automation Systems Maintenance

# Level 3: Supervision & Troubleshooting
## Industrial Automation Engineering Supervision
- Industrial Automation Drafting Supervision
- Industrial Automation Fabrication And Sub-Assembling Supervision
- Industrial Automation Installation Supervision
- Industrial Automation Systems Maintenance Supervision
- Industrial Automation Engineering Unit Supervisory Function
